Spoil Engine.
drop bomb with style.
This 5-piece metalband from Belgium/Holland started 2004, combining 90's metal influences such Pantera, Machine head Slipknot with postmodern heaviness soundscapes.
Over years, they evolved broader, catchier even more dynamic sound veins Killswitch Engage, Flames BMTH.
'till now, band recorded full albums: 'Skinnerbox v.07 (2007)', 'Antimatter (2009)' 'The Imperfection (2012)'.
With 'Antimatter', Spoil Engine became first Belgian band years sign with Roadrunner International, which appearances national radio ('De Afrekening'), national television larger venues/festivals such Graspop (4x), Pukkelpop (2x), Vorst Nationaal Clubcircuit.
They also directly supported bands such Motörhead, Volbeat, Prong, Killswitch Engage Arch Enemy only name few.

It's subject that's particularly important lifelong resident Southern Indiana, where electric utility, Vectren, forced consumers highest electricity rates anywhere Midwest putting forward plan that would drive those rates even higher.
While Vectren proudly points essentially flat rates since 2011, those rates still nearly higher than Indiana average.
Since 2011, Vectren rates have been stable approximately 15.5 cents/kilowatt-hour.
average rate state Indiana 11.31 even lower past.
fact, Vectren rates nearly times those charged just across river Henderson, Kentucky higher than Indianapolis Power Light.
Energy powers every part lives high electricity costs have negative impact virtually everything
Residents Vectren's area coverage fixed income struggle more than those areas with more reasonable rates.
Businesses less likely locate this area.
People less likely move here.
Property values lower.
Now, Vectren pushing plan that would make electricity prices even higher.
wants shut down existing generating facilities order build billion dollar natural fueled power plant with more capacity.
time when demand flattened, excess capacity needed.
Moreover, Vectren proposing additional capacity form solar.
Being for-profit monopoly, Vectren's profits regulated.
only that utilities like Vectren increase total profits through capital expenditures that passed customers higher rates.
Smart meters?
them.
Solar farms?
Oversized generating facilities?
That's right, them.
It's time Indiana Utility Regulatory Commission demand that Vectren stop placing profits above obligation provide customers with affordable reliable energy, reject Vectren's plan raise electric bills.
